# SonicSaaS

> SonicSaaS is the only fleet management platform built specifically for MSPs who manage SonicWall firewalls. It replaces fragmented tools and manual workflows with a single dashboard that monitors fleet health, enforces security policies, syncs documentation automatically, and provides SOC 2-grade audit trails — all at a fraction of the cost of SonicWall NSM.

## The Problem SonicSaaS Solves

MSPs managing SonicWall fleets today face a broken workflow: logging into firewalls one at a time, copying status into IT Glue manually, creating ConnectWise tickets by hand, and hoping documentation stays accurate (it doesn't). SonicWall's own tools (NSM, GMS) are built for vendors, not MSPs — they lack multi-tenant isolation, granular RBAC, credential governance, and cross-system integrations.

The result: stale documentation, weak credential security, no audit trail, and expensive per-device fees for tools that don't solve the real problem.

## Why SonicSaaS Wins

### Purpose-Built for MSPs
Built by an MSP operator managing 300+ SonicWall devices daily. Every feature exists because it solved a real operational problem — not because a product manager guessed. The architecture is MSP-native: multi-tenant client isolation, team-based RBAC, and workflows designed for managing fleets across dozens of clients.

### Bidirectional Integrations That Keep Data in Sync
SonicSaaS doesn't just monitor — it connects the systems MSPs already use and keeps them in sync automatically:
- **SonicWall** (50+ API endpoints, Gen 6 and Gen 7): Full fleet management, firmware tracking, config backup/restore, security audits
- **IT Glue** (bidirectional): Devices auto-import, changes sync back to documentation — IT Glue stays accurate without manual updates
- **ConnectWise PSA** (bidirectional): Agreement scanning, company sync, product mapping, automated ticket creation from fleet events
- **Splunk & Huntress**: Log shipping for SIEM integration and threat visibility
- **MySonicWall**: Firmware source, license tracking, cloud backup integration

### Data Quality as a Feature
SonicSaaS is the only platform that measures and scores how accurate your documentation actually is:
- **Documentation Health Score**: See exactly how your IT Glue matches device reality
- **PSA Accuracy Score**: ConnectWise product mappings vs actual device state
- **Normalized Data Layer**: 18+ config types (interfaces, routes, NAT, rules, VPN, DHCP, DNS, security services) extracted, normalized, and searchable across your entire fleet

### SOC 2-Grade Security Built In
Not bolted on after the fact — designed from day one:
- **5-role RBAC** (Owner, Admin, Operator, Viewer, Auditor) with 14 resource-level permissions — not just "admin" and "user"
- **Immutable audit trail**: Every action logged with actor, result, permission used, and changes. SOC 2 CC7.2 compliant
- **AES-256-GCM credential encryption**: Device passwords never exposed to users or API. Decrypted only server-side at request time
- **Team isolation**: Every query scoped by team. Child MSPs cannot see each other's devices, configs, or credentials — even if RBAC is bypassed

### AI-Ready Architecture
SonicSaaS is designed as the governed access layer for AI-powered fleet management:
- Verified, normalized data (AI on bad data = hallucinations)
- AI agents operate through the same RBAC, audit trails, and credential governance as humans
- Trust ladder: observe, suggest, act-with-approval, act-autonomously — MSPs control the pace

## Key Features

- **Fleet Dashboard**: Real-time status, firmware, connection health for every firewall at a glance
- **Security Checks**: Automated audits for outdated firmware, missing licenses, risky local accounts, policy drift
- **Health Scores**: Single numeric score per firewall — instantly see what needs attention
- **Multi-Tenant**: Isolated environments per client, managed from one login
- **Team Access**: Invite team members with role-based permissions controlling visibility and actions
- **Activity Log**: Complete audit trail — who did what, when, and to which firewall
- **Config Extraction**: 18+ normalized config types searchable and comparable across your fleet
- **Automated Documentation Sync**: IT Glue stays accurate because device state flows into it automatically

## Who It's For

- Managed Service Providers (MSPs) managing SonicWall firewall fleets for multiple clients
- IT teams operating 10+ SonicWall appliances across multiple sites
- Security-conscious organizations that need credential governance and audit trails for firewall management

## Comparison with Alternatives

| Capability | SonicSaaS | SonicWall NSM | Auvik | Manual/Scripts |
|-----------|-----------|---------------|-------|----------------|
| MSP multi-tenant isolation | Yes | Limited | Yes | No |
| Granular RBAC (5 roles, 14 resources) | Yes | Admin/User only | Limited | No |
| IT Glue bidirectional sync | Yes | No | No | No |
| ConnectWise PSA integration | Yes | No | No | No |
| Documentation health scoring | Yes | No | No | No |
| Credential encryption + governance | Yes | Basic | N/A | No |
| Immutable audit trail | Yes | Basic logging | Yes | No |
| Flat-tier pricing (no per-device) | Yes | No (per-device) | No (per-device) | Free but unscalable |
| AI-ready governed access | Yes | No | No | No |
